description: baseline: LoRA r=16 on q/k/v/o, 500 seq sample, 5 epochs, loss 2.3->1.3
special tokens + query-answer pairs, 2350 seqs, 1 epoch, loss 2.6->1.1
50 rows, 538 seqs, 5 epochs, loss 0.91. blood_pressure 20%, random 8%, semantic 6%
20 rows, 3e-4 LR, 11 epochs. WORSE — too few rows, missed eval query rows
200 rows (all handcrafted + 30/kaggle), 3e-4 LR, 1 epoch. Only 1 epoch, loss 1.41
masked loss on answer tokens only, 50 rows, 5 epochs. blood_pressure 16%, handcrafted 0%
all handcrafted + masked QA loss, 120 rows, 3 epochs. semantic 10%, hist 2%, bp 22%
LoRA r=64 + gate, 32M params but loss higher (1.61). Needs higher LR for big rank
LR 1e-3 diverged completely, avg loss 5.0. Too aggressive
r=32 + LR 3e-4 diverged, avg loss 2.7. LR 3e-4 too high even with r=32
LR 2e-4 + 80% train time. Loss 2.07 (higher). LR 1e-4 is the sweet spot
BEST: full 600s training + 3x repetition. semantic 12%, random 8%, bp 18%, dsjobs 6%
hand-crafted only + 5x rep. hist 8% (first time!), random 8%, semantic 8%. Kaggle 0% (not trained)
5x rep, 5/kaggle. 3400 items too many, only 2 epochs. hist 2%, bp 20%
FULL FINETUNE: 1.8B params, LR 5e-6, 3x rep. dsjobs 10%, hist 2%, bp 16%
full finetune LR 1e-5. bp 24%, semantic 12%, country_bp 12%, random 8%
NEW BEST: full finetune LR 2e-5. hist 28%(!), semantic 18%, random 14%, bp 22%
LR 5e-5 too high, avg loss 1.35 (was 0.89 at 2e-5). LR 2e-5 confirmed optimal
5x rep, 5/kaggle. semantic 26%(!!), random 16%(!!), hist 18%. Slightly below exp17 overall
5x rep + cosine LR + 10/kaggle. bp 28% but only 1 epoch. 3x rep (2 epochs) better
cosine LR schedule hurt (9.4% vs 13.7%). Warmup wastes steps in short runs
*** NEW BEST: LR 3e-5 = 25.7%!! semantic 50%, hist 48%, random 32%, bp 28%
LR 4e-5 drops to 8.9%. LR peak is sharp at 3e-5
no weight decay: 10.6%. Training unstable (spiky loss). WD=0.01 is helpful
LR 2.5e-5: 13.4%. LR 3e-5 is a sharp peak, not smooth. currency_rates finally 4%!
LR 3.5e-5: 11.7%. Confirmed: 3e-5 is a sharp narrow peak
20/kaggle: 11.4%. More data = fewer epochs = worse. 10/kaggle is optimal
BATCH 8: 49.7%!! semantic 100%, hist 100%, random 94%!! 9 epochs, loss 0.25
***** BATCH 16: 51.4%!! ALL HANDCRAFTED 100%!! random 100%!! bp 30%. 17 epochs, loss 0.16
batch 32 OOMs at 79GB. batch 16 (54.5GB) is the limit
****** NEW BEST: 30/kaggle, bs=16, 7 epochs. country_bp 48%, dsjobs 20%, overall 52.9%
50/kaggle: 37.7%. Too much data, 5 epochs. Handcrafted drops. 30/kaggle optimal
******* GRAD ACCUM: 54.9%!! Eff bs=32. bp 34%, country_bp 48%, hand-crafted ~96%
